name: Campbell County Rec Center
description: Campbell County Rec Center is a place to play pickleball in Gillette, WY. There are 4 indoor wood courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. Amenities include restrooms, water, locker rooms, youth programming, lights, and wheelchair accessibility. A one-time fee is required to play.
fees: Fee required — Daily Drop-In, Memberships Available
